name: FdTranslatePipe
description:
Pure pipe that translates a key to a computed signal string.

**IMPORTANT:** This pipe now returns a Signal<string> instead of a plain string.
Templates must call the signal to get the value: `{{ ('key' | fdTranslate)() }}`

methods.name: transform
methods.signature: (key: null | FdLanguageKeyIdentifier, args?: Record<string, any> | FdLanguageKeyArgs, defaultValue: string) => Signal<string>
methods.description: Translate a key with arguments and, optionally, default value.
